basic_details.job_title: Kamala Nehru College Delhi Counsellor Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Kamala Nehru College Delhi has released an official notification for Walk-in Interview for College Counsellor Posts. Eligible candidates can attend the Walk-in Interview on 30 July 2026 at the Kamala Nehru College Delhi office with original documents and self-attested copies.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Phil in Clinical Psychology/Counselling Psychology with 1 year experience OR Masters in Clinical Psychology/Counselling Psychology with 3 years experience.
qualification.details: College Counsellor: M.Phil in Clinical Psychology/Counselling Psychology with 1 year of relevant experience. Masters in Clinical Psychology/Counselling Psychology with 3 years of relevant experience. Preference will be given to candidates with prior experience in educational institutions. Good communication skills in English and Hindi, and experience with the age group 18-22 are desirable. | Salary will be discussed at the time of the Interview based on the number and duration of visits per week.

salary_details.pay_scale: To be discussed at the time of Interview based on the number and duration of visits per week.

content_sections.heading: Kamala Nehru College Delhi College Counsellor Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Kamala Nehru College Delhi Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Kamala Nehru College Delhi College Counsellor Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Kamala Nehru College Delhi College Counsellor Vacancy Details 2026
Kamala Nehru College Delhi College Counsellor Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: College Counsellor: M.Phil in Clinical Psychology/Counselling Psychology with 1 year of relevant experience. Masters in Clinical Psychology/Counselling Psychology with 3 years of relevant experience. Preference will be given to candidates with prior experience in educational institutions. Good communication skills in English and Hindi, and experience with the age group 18-22 are desirable. Salary will be discussed at the time of the Interview based on the number and duration of visits per week.

content_sections.heading: Kamala Nehru College Delhi College Counsellor Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Kamala Nehru College Delhi College Counsellor Selection Process 2026
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for Kamala Nehru College Delhi College Counsellor Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the Kamala Nehru College Delhi recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the Kamala Nehru College Delhi recruitment is College Counsellor.

faq.question: Q2. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in.

faq.question: Q3. When is the walk-in interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 30 July 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required for the College Counsellor post?
faq.answer: Candidates need an M.Phil in Clinical Psychology/Counselling Psychology with 1 year experience or a Masters in Clinical Psychology/Counselling Psychology with 3 years experience.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any preference for candidates with experience in educational institutions?
faq.answer: Yes, preference will be given to candidates with prior experience in educational institutions.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for the College Counsellor position?
faq.answer: The salary will be discussed at the time of the interview, based on the number and duration of visits per week.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should candidates bring to the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should bring original documents along with photocopies of testimonials and the latest CV.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies for the College Counsellor post?
faq.answer: There is 1 vacancy for the College Counsellor post.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website of Kamala Nehru College Delhi?
faq.answer: The official website of Kamala Nehru College Delhi is www.knc.du.ac.in.

faq.question: Q10. Are there any age limit criteria mentioned in the notification?
faq.answer: The age limit details are not explicitly mentioned in the provided data and candidates are advised to refer to the official notification.
